Ruling: PLAINTIFF PRIME LASALLE/MADISON PARTNERS LLC'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights And Restraining Disposition Of Right To Payment is GRANTED as unopposed. Order signed. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
